summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to drive implementations to value through change management, training, and a systematic, human-centered approach.
